name: App Shell
responsibility: Tauri application lifecycle management. Provides system tray/menubar integration, window management, global hotkey registration, and the IPC bridge between React frontend and Rust backend modules. Routes all frontend commands to the appropriate backend module.

interfaces.name: ipc:task_create
interfaces.api_detail: Tauri invoke command. Routes to Data Store task_create. Also starts Agent Watcher if auto-detection is possible.

interfaces.name: ipc:task_list
interfaces.api_detail: Returns task list with embedded summary data: name, status, current intent statement, agent count, has_drift, has_unreviewed. Used by menubar panel.

interfaces.name: ipc:task_get_card
interfaces.api_detail: Aggregated query for Layer 1 card rendering. Single IPC call returns all data needed for the card. Must respond within 200ms (INV-005).

interfaces.name: ipc:task_switch

output_schema.capture_result: { snapshot_id: string, completeness: string, auto_resume_note: string } | null

interfaces.api_detail: Orchestrates the full switch flow: 1) If from_task_id is set, trigger Capture Engine for the departing task and park it. 2) Activate to_task_id. 3) Return the Layer 1 card data for the arriving task. Capture runs async — switch is not blocked by capture (INV-003).

interfaces.name: ipc:save_resume_note
interfaces.api_detail: Saves a manual resume note (overrides auto-generated one). Called when user types in the capture bar.

interfaces.name: ipc:update_agent_branch
interfaces.api_detail: Routes to Agent Watcher update_manual_branch (for manual) or Data Store agent_branch_update (for auto).

interfaces.name: ipc:get_briefing
interfaces.api_detail: Routes to Event Aggregator generate_briefing. Returns a fresh briefing each time (generates from unread events).

interfaces.name: ipc:get_graph_data

output_schema.intent_nodes: Vec<{ id: string, version: int, statement: string, trigger: string, created_at: string }>
output_schema.branch_edges: Vec<{ branch_id: string, platform: string, color: string, forked_from_intent_id: string, status: string, has_drift: boolean, drift_summary?: string }>

interfaces.api_detail: Aggregated query for Layer 2 graph rendering. Returns all IntentSnapshots and AgentBranches for a task, pre-structured for React Flow consumption.

interfaces.name: ipc:park_all_tasks
interfaces.api_detail: Session-end parking. For each active task: trigger capture, park. Returns summary of all parked tasks.

interfaces.name: ipc:start_review
interfaces.api_detail: Routes to Event Aggregator start_review_timer. Called when user opens a card/graph focusing on a branch.

interfaces.name: ipc:open_external
interfaces.api_detail: Opens an external application/URL. Uses tauri::api::shell::open for URLs, custom logic for terminal/IDE positioning.

interfaces.name: ipc:query_review_logs
interfaces.api_detail: Routes to Data Store review_log_query. Minimal retrospective audit interface.

interfaces.name: ipc:configure_auto_launch
interfaces.api_detail: Enables or disables auto-start on system login. Uses tauri-plugin-autostart (wraps macOS SMLoginItemSetEnabled / Windows registry Run key). Called from settings UI or first-launch onboarding.

interfaces.name: ipc:get_unreviewed_branch_count
interfaces.api_detail: Routes to Event Aggregator get_unreviewed_branch_count. Returns the count of completed agent branches that have not been approved. Used for the menubar icon numeric badge.

data_models.name: TaskSummary
data_models.note: Derived view model for menubar panel. Computed from Task + branches + drift markers.

data_models.name: HotkeyConfig
data_models.note: Stored in Tauri app config. User-configurable in future versions.

state_machine.name: AppLifecycle

transitions.trigger: Database migrated, watchers started, tray created
User clicks tray icon or presses toggle hotkey
User clicks outside panel, presses Escape, or presses toggle hotkey
User clicks tray icon or presses toggle hotkey

state_machine.note: ready and panel_closed are functionally equivalent — separated for clarity. The app is always 'ready' after initialization.

nfr_constraints.performance: IPC command roundtrip < 200ms for aggregated queries (task_get_card, get_graph_data). Simple CRUD commands < 50ms. App cold start < 2 seconds including DB migration.
nfr_constraints.security: No network access. IPC is local-only (Tauri's built-in security). Hotkeys registered with OS-level global shortcut API.
nfr_constraints.other: Tray icon uses platform-native APIs (NSStatusItem on macOS, Shell_NotifyIcon on Windows). Panel window is a borderless Tauri window positioned below the tray icon. macOS Accessibility permission requested on first launch for window focus detection.
